languages.text: "Простите за дерзость, не угодно ли вам выслушать вассалов перед боем?"

traits.locale_text: [Драфт] Предлагаем выслушать мнение свиты, хотя зачем мы предлагаем, такой великий вольный торговец и сам бы предложил, простите

languages.text: "Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"
languages.original_text: "Простите за дерзость, не угодно ли вам выслушать вассалов перед боем?"

traits.locale_text: "Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"
"Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"
"Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"

languages.text: “大人，恕我冒昧，您是否愿意在开战前听听封臣们的意见？”
languages.original_text: "Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"

traits.locale_text: “大人，恕我冒昧，您是否愿意在开战前听听封臣们的意见？”

languages.text: « Pardonnez mon impertinence, mais Votre Seigneurie serait-elle disposée à écouter ses vassaux avant de donner l'assaut ? »
languages.original_text: "Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"

traits.locale_text: « Pardonnez mon impertinence, mais Votre Seigneurie serait-elle disposée à écouter ses vassaux avant de donner l'assaut ? »

languages.text: «Perdone la impertinencia, milord, pero ¿le interesaría escuchar a sus vasallos antes de la batalla?».
languages.original_text: "Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"

traits.locale_text: «Perdone la impertinencia, milord, pero ¿le interesaría escuchar a sus vasallos antes de la batalla?».

languages.text: "Küstahlığımı bağışlayın... Lord Hazretleri, savaştan önce tebaasını dinlemek ister miydi?"
languages.original_text: "Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"

traits.locale_text: "Küstahlığımı bağışlayın... Lord Hazretleri, savaştan önce tebaasını dinlemek ister miydi?"

languages.text: "Verzeiht mir meine Impertinenz, aber wären Eure Lordschaft bereit, vor der Schlacht Eure Vasallen anzuhören?"
languages.original_text: "Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"

traits.locale_text: "Verzeiht mir meine Impertinenz, aber wären Eure Lordschaft bereit, vor der Schlacht Eure Vasallen anzuhören?"

languages.text: 「失礼ですが、殿、戦いの前に臣下から報告を頂きたいと存じますか？」
languages.original_text: "Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"

traits.locale_text: 「失礼ですが、殿、戦いの前に臣下から報告を頂きたいと存じますか？」
